name: Aegean Sea Chowder (Psarosoupa Kakavia)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb White fish, cut into 2-inch pieces
2 lb Canned peeled tomatoes, including liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and cut the fish and shellfish into bite-size pieces.
2. Heat olive oil in a large pot.
3. Fry onions and garlic on medium heat for 5 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes (with liquid), mushrooms, celery, salt, cayenne pepper, bay leaf, and wine to the pot. Stir well.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
6. Cook for one hour.
7. Add the fish and octopus, and cook an additional 20 minutes.
8. Finally, add the shellfish and simmer for another 5 minutes.
9. Serve hot with crusty bread and crisp salad.
